message.lc_ftb_hook.insufficient_funds: Not enough money for this action (cost: %1$s, you have: %2$s).
message.lc_ftb_hook.insufficient_funds_b: Not enough money to claim %2$s chunks (cost: %1$s, you have: %3$s).
Not enough money for %2$s chunk claims (cost: %1$s each, you have: %3$s).
message.lc_ftb_hook.insufficient_funds_p: Not enough money to enable this protection. Your change was reverted.
message.lc_ftb_hook.claim_visibility_loc: Claim visibility is always public and cannot be changed.
message.lc_ftb_hook.unclaim_refund: Refunded %1$s (%2$s%% of claim price) for unclaiming this chunk.
message.lc_ftb_hook.unclaim_refund_bulk: Refunded %1$s (%3$s%% of claim price) for unclaiming %2$s chunks.
message.lc_ftb_hook.unaffordable_restora: Top up your account — they will activate next upkeep.
message.lc_ftb_hook.suspension_wars_head: Outgoing wars paused — balance too low
message.lc_ftb_hook.suspension_hint: Top up your account — protections resume next upkeep.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_locked: Your team could not pay upkeep. Some protections and wars were frozen until you can afford them again.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_unlocked: Your team balance is sufficient again. You may change protections.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_locked_ch: Protections are locked until your team can pay upkeep again.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_paid: Your team paid %1$s for the next %2$s.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_see_more_hove: Click to view the upkeep breakdown
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_detail.denied: Only team owners and officers can view upkeep details.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_detail.unavai: No recent upkeep payment to show details for.
message.lc_ftb_hook.team_disband_denied: This LC team is linked to an active FTB party. Disband the FTB party first, or wait for the link to be cleared if the party was already removed.
message.lc_ftb_hook.team_role_change_den: This LC team is linked to an FTB party. Change ranks and members in FTB Teams instead.
message.lc_ftb_hook.party_disband_settle: Party disbanded: Team account held %1$s. %3$s chunks sold for %4$s. You received %2$s total on your personal account.
message.lc_ftb_hook.party_join_claim_ref: Your personal claims were dissolved when joining the party. Refunded %1$s for %2$s chunks.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_change_pe: Protection change queued until the next upkeep period.
message.lc_ftb_hook.forceload_change_pen: Force-load change queued until the next upkeep period.
message.lc_ftb_hook.chunk_type_toggled_l: Chunk switched to a land chunk.
message.lc_ftb_hook.chunk_type_toggled_b: Chunk switched to a build chunk.
message.lc_ftb_hook.chunk_type_change_pe: Land chunk change queued until the next upkeep period.
Build chunk change queued until the next upkeep period.
message.lc_ftb_hook.chunk_type_queued_bu: %1$s chunk type change(s) queued (%2$s to land, %3$s to build).
message.lc_ftb_hook.chunk_type_denied: You can only change the type of your own claimed chunks.
message.lc_ftb_hook.chunk_type_insuffici: Not enough money to change this chunk's type.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.protection_prices_note_l: Build protection prices are per chunk.
Land protection prices are per %2$s chunks / %1$s.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.protection_price_war_inc: Incoming war (%1$s team(s)): upkeep x %2$s (sum l^i) — base %3$s, effective %4$s
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.title: War
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.empty_outgoing: You have not declared war on anyone.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.view_only: Only team owners and officers can declare war.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.cost_tooltip.title: Your war upkeep costs
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.cost_tooltip.multipl: War exponent l = %s. Incoming upkeep scales as base x sum(l^i). Outgoing war n costs target upkeep x l^n.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.entry_tooltip.no_cla: No upkeep yet — costs apply once they claim chunks and enable protections.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.entry_tooltip.pendin: War declaration pending — takes effect at the next upkeep period.
War end pending — takes effect at the next upkeep period.
This team has a pending war declaration against you.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.entry_tooltip.oppone: This team also has a pending war declaration against you.
gui.lc_ftb_hook.war.entry_tooltip.click_: Click the row to cancel the pending change.
message.lc_ftb_hook.war_declare_pending: War declaration on %s queued until the next upkeep period.
message.lc_ftb_hook.war_end_pending: War end with %s queued until the next upkeep period.
message.lc_ftb_hook.war_denied: Only team owners and officers can manage war.
message.lc_ftb_hook.war_self: You cannot declare war on yourself.
message.lc_ftb_hook.war_no_claims: Both teams must have claimed chunks to declare war.
message.lc_ftb_hook.war_insufficient: Not enough money to afford upkeep after declaring war.
message.lc_ftb_hook.war_suspended_upkeep: Outgoing wars were paused because your team could not pay full upkeep. They remain queued for restoration.
message.lc_ftb_hook.protection_suspended: %s was suspended because your team could not pay upkeep.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_unpaid_frozen: Your team could not pay upkeep. Protections and wars remain frozen until your balance is sufficient.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_priority.head: Upkeep dismantle priority (1 = last protection off, highest = first off):
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_priority.lege: Lower numbers are restored first; higher numbers are dismantled first when upkeep fails.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_priority.empt: No active billable protections or outgoing wars.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_priority.deni: Only team owners and officers can view upkeep priority.
message.lc_ftb_hook.war_disabled: War is disabled on this server.
message.lc_ftb_hook.seed_test_teams.unav: FTB Teams or FTB Chunks is not loaded.
message.lc_ftb_hook.test_teams.debug_dis: Test team commands are disabled. Set debug.debugTestTeamCommands to true in lc_ftb_hook-server.toml.
message.lc_ftb_hook.seed_test_teams.done: Created %1$s test teams (%2$s already existed, %3$s failed). Demo wars: %4$s incoming, %5$s outgoing, %6$s available targets. Reopen the war screen to refresh.
message.lc_ftb_hook.clear_test_teams.don: Removed %1$s test teams (%2$s skipped, %3$s failed). Demo wars with your team were cleared. Reopen the war screen to refresh.
message.lc_ftb_hook.count_test_teams.don: Debug test teams: %1$s total (%2$s with claimed chunks). Slots WarTest01–WarTest%3$s: %4$s present.
message.lc_ftb_hook.tax_collector_denied: Only team owners and officers can place tax collectors in claimed chunks.
message.lc_ftb_hook.tax_collector_wrong_: You can only place tax collectors in your own team's claimed chunks.
message.lc_ftb_hook.upkeep_detail.pendin: These changes were not applied yet — usually because your team could not afford them.
